name: nekoBT
description: nekoBT torrent provider for Seanime. Requires an API key from your nekoBT account settings (not your session cookie).
author: bruuhim

fields.name: apiKey
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Your nekoBT API key from account settings (Settings > API Keys > Generate). Do NOT paste your browser ssid session cookie — use a generated API key only.

fields.name: apiUrl
fields.label: API Base URL
fields.description: Base URL for the nekoBT JSON API. Change only if you are self-hosting.
